description: Small, snappy, and with a temper as explosive as its name. Handle with caution!

name: Mustyfur Fel Snooter
description: An especially aggressive snooter. Its unpleasant disposition makes it an outcast among other snooters.

name: Rak-Ush Threadling
description: Awww, aren't her pedipalps adorable?

name: Arachnoid Hatchling
description: Many arachnids are left to fend for themselves after hatching. It's a common topic in spider therapy.

name: Chitin Burrower
description: Tough burrowing claws make it easy for arachnids to get around subterranean areas. But it's a boring life.

name: Argos
description: The Imperial Lynx is known for being stubborn and moody, but fiercely loyal to those they form bonds with.

name: Skippy
description: Watch Skippy swim, and then watch him run. The perfect amphibian. Sorry, frogs.

name: Wriggle
description: The wily fish has never been caught at the end of an angler's hook. He was caught a completely different way.

name: Waddles
description: Waddles was rejected by the other cave skippers and fell through the cracks, literally, all the way down to Harandar. He's known to follow around people he finds.

name: Moss Skipper
description: Finally caught a blind cave skipper. He flopped helplessly for twenty minutes and then let out a burp. Great companion he is!

name: Winged Arachnoid
description: It's a bird! It's a gyrocopter! No wait, it's something way worse. Run.

name: Venomwing
description: It's not the most original anti-hero name. But it promises to be a compelling crossover.

name: Sceaduthax
description: This dark-shelled monster thrives in shadows. It's where he does all his best thinking.

name: Pillarnest Bonedrinker
description: Is it possible to drink bones? Not without a positive mental attitude it's not!

name: Fallowspark Glowfly
description: The green glow of this firefly is seen as an ill-omen for those who travel in darkness.

name: Azure Flickerfly
description: The flickering of these lightbugs is said to bring an unnatural and eerie calm to travelers and predators alike.

name: Vibrant Glowfly
description: Though their light is sometimes mistaken for the glow of toxic substances or dark magic, nerubians and Arathi alike find these insects hauntingly beautiful.

name: Waxwick
description: In a miracle of dreams and wishes, Waxwick awoke and climbed off a kobold's head to pursue her own path.

name: Magmashell Crawler
description: Not to be kept indoors if you live in a wooden house.

name: Burntram
description: Look out! He's comin' right for us! Gradually!

name: Devouring Runt
description: Hungry? Try eating your foes!

name: Shalewing Devourer
description: It doesn't even bother to chew its food.

name: Salverun
description: Perhaps you'd like to see how snakelike it can be!

name: Skaarn
description: Skaarn likes to coil up inside of your backpack.

name: Fathom Incher
description: In the depths of the Endless Sea, strange thalassic horrors lurk. Not this fella, though. He's completely normal.

name: Starkstripe Hopper
description: Brightly colored means do not touch. Red is nature's warning light!

name: Oop'lajax
description: He's a little jumpy... especially around the face.

name: Aubergine Scootlefish
description: Not a squid, nor a kid, the scootlefish prefers to keep its ink to itself except under dire circumstances.

name: Verdant Scootlefish
description: Cute at this size, the humble scootlefish poses a real threat to ships when it grows larger.

name: Shadowy Oozeling
description: The perfect pet if you love stepping on something wet in the middle of the night.

name: Jade Cragviper
description: The Jade Cragviper's favorite food is broccoli. Actually, sorry. I just made that up.

name: Aquapo
description: The fury of the sea in the packge of a puddle.

name: Heartseeker Moth
description: Whereas some moths are attracted to light, this particular moth seems attracted to warm, fuzzy feelings. Some say the phrase "butterflies in your stomach" actually refers to an infestation of Heartseeker Moths.

name: Fathom
description: Weighed down by all the loot he has plundered. He could share the burden he carries but it turns out he's a little shellfish.

name: Voidling Ooze
description: If you hold this up to your ear, you can hear whispers of the Old Gods. Just like a seashell!

name: Writhing Transmutagen
description: The early worms get the bird.

name: Undermoth
description: Undermoths are known to be some of the most intelligent moths on Azeroth. This is not saying much.

name: Teardrop Moth
description: Contrary to their name, these moths are actually quite happy.

name: Rithro
description: While napping in shrubbery, sometimes his snaggletooth gets caught on a leaf.

name: Astral Emperor's Serpentling
description: It is said that the Astral Emperor wove these creatures from the stuff of the stars themselves. It is also said that he used only the cutest star-stuff.

name: Muskpaw Calf
description: This little yak is far snugglier than most of it's kin. And slightly less smelly!

name: Weechi
description: Weechi adores attention and what better way to get attention than wearing a costume? Simply seek out a Pet Grooming Station to customize this sweet, wonderous little buddy.

name: Lil' Wrathion
description: Tell them that I am free of my father's madness, and I will be free of them as well. I am to be left alone: this will be my first and only warning. - Wrathion

name: Nelthara
description: Augmented by Adamanthia's Ebon Might, this whelpling is ready to face any challenge.

name: Senega
description: Senega is always ready for a ley crystal snack.

name: Axel
description: Axel likes to chase bees. No one knows why.

name: Fragrant Stonelamb
description: Protosheep spend winters bereft their flowers. When the seasons turn, the plains are filled with a variety of earthy, sweet scents.

name: Fyrn
description: Fyrn will be the first one to show up at your birthday party and the last to leaf.

name: Hallowed Glowfly
description: This hallowed firefly's glow scours the darkness, a welcome omen for the Arathi living in Hallowfall.

name: Bop
description: Woah there pardner. Were you really about to buzz by without saying howdy?

name: Shadowbog Hopper
description: Restoring hope to those lost in the darkness comes with its just rewards. Like cute frog friends.

name: Kromos
description: Kromos can often be found napping in sandboxes.

name: Sandstone Mosswool
description: These lambs savor a journey to the beaches of Khaz Algar to rest in warm sands.

name: Lil' Moss Rosy
description: Counting sheep to a dream of springtime.

name: Spinner
description: She'll try spinning, that's a good trick.

name: Anub'Rekyute
description: He hears little hearts melting. Faster now!

name: Webbers
description: Web ball! Stone of reality! Web ball! Stone of reality!

name: Itchbite
description: A bug? Wait a minute, no, it's a small friendly spider!

name: Shale Mosswool
description: Expert Earthen florists are capable of arranging beautiful floral patterns upon the backs of protosheep.

name: Brown Leafbug
description: When you tell a bad joke, he'll be there to let you know.

name: Skittish Sniffler
description: Capable of sensing vibrations and tremors nearly a mile away, these young moles tend to burrow at the first sign of mortal danger.

name: Snuffling
description: Even hard sediment poses little challenge to the digging claws of these critters.

name: Sneef
description: She's got a schnoz for sniffin'!

name: Guacamole
description: This snuffling loves limes.

name: Cinderhoney Emberstinger
description: THE BEES ARE ON FIRE NOW?

name: Loamy
description: The softest and fluffiest protosheep made of the softest and fluffiest soil.

name: Meek Bloodlasher
description: Fungal lashers are typically violent and carnivorous. This diminuative variety is better suited to shyly flail its limbs against fellow small fry.

name: Nightfarm Growthling
description: These highly destructive pests are known to destroy crops in Hallowfall.

name: Ghostcap Menace
description: The alluring twin mushroom cap colors of these fungal creatures attracts sentient and beastial victims alike.

name: Scourge of the Aspects
description: The Scourge of the Aspects is consumed by rage and filled with a hunger to consume. Its presense is a sign of an unpredictable and erratic future for any form of dragonkin.

name: Bouncer
description: Awww, aren't it's fuzzy little pedipalps cute?

name: Fuzzy
description: The next time you're sitting in the dark and feel something brush against your heel, don't worry! It's just Fuzzy.

name: Jump Jump
description: I jump, Jon. It's what I do.

name: Fringe
description: Someone once mistook Fringe for an azerite node. He's too young to remember azerite, though.

name: Blightbud
description: Please keep your blightbud on a leash at all times! They are notorious for the havoc they can wreak on unprotected gardens.

name: Chester
description: Part lean, mean candle-throwing machine. Part adventurer wannabe. All kobold.

name: Cobalt Ramolith
description: The grand horns of these beasts spark jealousy in other horned grazing animals.

name: Granite Ramolith
description: Earthen ranchers keep a variety of horned beasts for labor and company. None are so proud as the ramolith.

name: Alabaster Stonecharger
description: Protorams leave behind stony dust as they frolic, battle, and rest.

name: Teatuft Tamer
description: The meeksi Teatuft Tamers love lounging with their Teatufts and sipping a cup of mystical tea after a long lazy day.

name: Fullbelly Rollingpaw
description: The Fullbelly meeksi will often put their own safety at risk if they smell food. Nothing brings them happiness like a cup of tea and a warm meal.

name: Dreamborne Scarab
description: Compared to a fully grown dreamborne scarab, this is the lesser of two weevils.

name: Dreamhoof
description: Be sure to sleep with some grass under your pillow so you can give this critter a snack while you dream.

name: Bedrock Stonecharger
description: Young protorams love to play and bluff charge. They also love to actually charge.

name: Thrrrdgl
description: Thrrrdgl is content with not being a top choice or even a second choice.  Thrrrdgl believes that first and second are the worst and third is the best.

name: Mister Mans
description: Given his boisterous behavior, we can only assume that he became imbued with the void from starting a fight. The question remains; who won?

name: Dream Badger
description: A brown dream badger is a rare sight. Not so rare a smell though.

name: Snoots
description: Snoots has a supernatural sense of smell. It's not any better than normal, it's just supernatural.

name: Ivy
description: Since you rescued her from Larodar, this grateful little doe hasn't stopped following you around.

name: Memorie
description: It is said that some animals dream in black and white. This animal only dreams in green.

name: Elmer
description: Elmer once ate a whole cake all by himself. It wasn't even his cake.

name: Spruce
description: What Spruce lacks in speed, she makes up for with sheer stubbornness.

name: Lil' Frostwing
description: Feel the chill nipping at your toes! A menace of Azeroth, now in festive blue and travel-size!

name: Napps
description: This creature could sleep through another Cataclysm.

name: Juniper
description: Juniper's unique coloration makes it hard to hide from predators in the Emerald Dream's lush green foliage. She therefore made the wise decision to travel with you instead.

name: Misty
description: There are many creatures lurking in the Cape of Stranglethorn who would be glad to kill you. Misty is just curious to see the rest of the world.

name: Snoozles
description: Snoozles was once given a choice between life in the timeless beautiful snowfields and life in a warm home with pet treats. We know which one he chose.

name: Sarge
description: When he's not hanging out with Harth Stonebrew or winning competitions at the tavern, Sarge loves to stow away in the backpacks of visiting adventurers.

name: Arathi Chicken
description: These silkie chickens were taken aboard airships by those departing the Arathi Empire in pursuit of their emperor's prophetic vision.

name: Craggles
description: This boarlet escaped Coldridge Valley in search of adventure and maybe a nice apple if she can find one.

name: Living Rose
description: When being adored, a Living Rose emits beautifully intoxicating aromas. When ignored, those aromas become actually toxic.

name: Greenlands Chicken
description: Free-range chickens are difficult to take care of in Hallowfall, what with all the shadow monsters and fish people.

name: Thunder
description: Someday, his heavy footfalls and ferocious roar will match his name. Until then, Thunder remains a bolt of cuteness and loyalty.

name: Tiberius
description: The Imperial Lynx hails from the shore of the far-flung Arathi Empire, where they serve as fierce and loyal companions and mounts for citizens.

name: Bean
description: The toes! The huge toe beans! The huge toe beans are not for eating!

name: Vanilla
description: This treasured lynx is a firm supporter of no changes.

name: Eye of Chaos
description: For so many years Mathias Shaw had his eyes and ears gathering intelligence around Azeroth. Now at least some eyes have come home.

name: Void-Scarred Parrot
description: Stormwind's Trade District sees many goods and animals pass through its auction house. Once the parrots of Stranglethorn were an expensive luxury. Now those present when N'zoth took over are a scourge.

name: Battleboar Piglet
description: Rigorously trained from birth these young boars eat, fight and sleep in their armor.

name: Mech-Friend Maya
description: Meet your new best mech-friend, Maya. Maya loves a good, tight wind-up so she can spring into action.

name: Hopeflutter
description: Wherever it goes, it leaves behind a soft glow that stirs hope in even the darkest places

name: Merriment
description: This thing is equally as evil as it is adorable.

name: Swiftpaw
description: Cub of Blazeclaw and valiant courier of Flame's Radiance. Swiftpaw serves the Sacred Flame more ferociously than some Arathi do.

name: Void-Scarred Scorpid
description: A creature prized by rogues for its venom. Many lived in the many holes and warrens of the Drag, but after the fall these new horrors emerged to menace the survivors.

name: Void-Scarred Tallstrider Chick
description: Rarely raised in captivity, Tallstrider's are extremely territorial. A small clutch of eggs was found during a hunt, and a tauren trainer came to Orgrimmar to show them off. However, after the fall, they have become deadly once more. So far, no one has been able to direct their corrupted forms.

name: Rusty Kroling
description: Once protected by the thick forests of the isle, these smaller and less aggressive krolusks have had to rapidly adapt to their recently deforested home.

name: Cave Kroling
description: Like many species of Krolusk, this variety seems to prefer the isles network of underground caves.

name: Doomfeathers
description: It glides through the air with shadowy wings and a trail of eerie whispers.

name: Shadefur Brewthief
description: If you have milk tea, keep an eye on it. Brewthieves love to pop out of the shadows and steal tea. Even worse, once in paw they love to show off their newly acquired beverage.

name: Faithful Dog
description: No longer lost or lonely, your faithful companion has decided that by your side is the best place to be.

name: Wobbles
description: Incredibly lifelike, this enchanted wax statue could pass for a real mole. If petting it didn't cause it to melt, that is.

name: Coppers
description: One hero's trash is another kobold's treasure. This unfortunately does not work in reverse.

name: Pillaged Parrot
description: This beautiful macaw is awfully far from home, and seeks the company of a more worthy companion than it's previous 'owners'.

name: Snapdragon Pup
description: It is said that the bite of a snapdragon pup is many times stronger and more potent than the adults.

name: Ada the Sweetest
description: PH - Tech was made to allow customizations.

name: Hawkstrider Hatchling
description: When does a hatchling become a fledgling if hawkstriders never fledge?

name: Foreman
description: Eagerly attends every cookout. He just wants to grill for gob's sake!

name: Eepy
description: He's just a bit tuckered out. He's just a little guy.

name: Scruff
description: Gotta be tough with the scruff.

name: Goggles
description: Do the hyenas need to wear goggles? Absolutely not. Does it look extremely cool? Incredibly.

name: Spotty
description: People get turned into rats sometimes. It's not that weird.

name: Ixthal the Observling
description: Ixthal enjoys hide-and-seek when not contemplating the slow devouring of entire worlds by the Void.

name: Mutt
description: One more thing... Show my hound some respect.

name: Wavebreaker Mechasaur
description: And then, woosh! It comes stampeding out of the ocean and like, roars! Raaargh!

name: Crimson Mechasaur
description: It's red because it like, killed so many bad guys! It's all their blood! And it's on fire too!

name: Viridian Mechasaur
description: It totally fell into a pit of acid but then it came back ten times stronger! So cool!!!

name: Fun-Size Flarendo
description: Nuh-uh! Yellow is coolest! It's themed after the original, who's totally gonna beat that stupid gorilla!

name: Frumpy Softpaw
description: These grumpy, frumpy meeksi only seem to find joy when drinking a boba milk tea with salted caramel and cookie dough.

name: Lil' Daz'ti
description: Ancient dinomancers once believed that pure white scales on dinosaurs indicated the influence of celestial bodies.  In their pursuit of balance, the Lun'alai have embraced these superstitions in their efforts to restore the white brutosaur.

name: Rocketfist
description: And even if they reach the danish, they'll never get past Rocketfist!

name: Mega-Mecha Gorilla
description: Mega-Mecha Gorilla possesses the strength of not one, but FIVE gorillas.

name: Tiny Torq
description: Tiny Torq's dad could TOTALLY beat up Flarendo's dad.

name: Professor Punch
description: And he was all like, Primal Punch!!

name: Bilgewater Junkhauler
description: Scrap metal hunks hauling junk.

name: Kal'andu
description: Rescued from the Druids of the Flame's onslaught upon the Emerald Dream, this juvenile faerie dragon has taken a liking to you -- and to your food. Don't leave your snacks unattended!

name: Seedle
description: Seedles burrow beneath plants in the emerald dreams and nibble at their roots.

name: Personal-Use Sapper
description: Fun for the whole family! A self-detonating robot for all occasions!

name: Mr. DELVER
description: Originally built by Dr. DELVER to compete with renowned treasure hunter Brann Bronzebeard. Never really panned out though, so now he just helps out.

name: Steamwheedle Flunkie
description: It's lame to have a hunchbacked crony mewl 'yes master' when you can just get a robot to do it for free.

name: Blackwater Kegmover
description: Being a pirate is alright with me, especially if you've got this thing willing to carry your grog.

name: Venture Companyman
description: Yes boss! Yes boss! Yes boss!

name: Dustite
description: Dustites scavenge among the roots of great trees for any small leavings they can find.

name: Somnolet
description: Dream on. Dream until your dream comes true!

name: Kabluey
description: Ten thousand years spent floating in a time stasis is quite a bit of time to work on material.

name: Wily Rat
description: The thicker and more gangly the whiskers, the more devious the rodent. That's just basic biology.

name: Acid-Drenched Rat
description: Stop me if you've heard this one before: they fell into a vat of radioactive acid.

name: Lab Rat
description: They weren't lying, this rat can absolutely get that dang cheese.

name: Squally
description: Though this little one's flight training has yet to be completed, their playfulness and enthusiasm are already fully grown.

name: Buggsy
description: Farmers will often release maidenbugs to battle the pests that threaten their crops. Buggsy was so good at this that she decided to go pro.

name: Underroach
description: Scientists, engineers, and gamers of Undermine must keep their desks clean lest they be visited by the underroaches.

name: Cruncher
description: The itchy legs! The wiggly antennae! Okay, fine, he's not cute. But he's trying!

name: Bombshell Crab
description: The natural habitat of these crabs is so polluted and devoid of shells that they've been forced to take shelter in discarded goblin munitions. Are you gonna keep littering after learning that?

name: Venture Bombshell
description: In a pinch, Venture Co. workers might use these creatures for some impromptu demolition. Get it? Pinch?

name: Cave Crab
description: Buried amid sand and sediment, these crabs blend right into their environment.

name: Kaja Crab
description: Did it spend too long near kaja'mite? Did someone give it kaja'cola? Who knows, but the name is great branding.

name: Paleshell Crab
description: Paleshell cave crabs are said to be the tastiest variety. Perhaps that's why they're the hardest to find.

name: Mechagopher
description: Do you see pity in these blinking, soulless eyes? I didn't think so.

name: Varmint MK II
description: Before the Mark II, Varmints were a sorry excuse for an annoying and over-engineered pest. Now, though? They're absolutely infuriating!

name: Lime Roboclucker
description: The acid-green accents add a sporty vibe to this flightless robotic bird thing.

name: Brrrgl
description: A master of distractions, Brrrgl can steal your heart with a dance, a fish or some friends.

name: Gill'el
description: Gill'el stepped down from leading Frostfin clan to commune with the elements. His return has sparked excitement in all.

name: Iron Chick
description: Shrugs off boiling oil and eleven secret herbs and spices. Just don't introduce it to rust.

name: Tropical Frog
description: A recent excavation on Zuldazar obliterated the natural habitat of these creatures and sent them spilling into the wilds.

name: Spring-Loaded Ribbitron
description: A robotic frog might seem useless, but once you're attacked by a swarm of mechanical flies, you'll be wishing you had one.

name: Ultrahopper EX
description: Faster. Stronger. And it can double jump.

name: Bluedoo
description: Bluedoo's magic and skills in accupuncture will help any in need of relaxation.

name: Reven
description: The game's afoot. Except when it is time to nap. Afterwards though, it's game on!

name: Grunch
description: It's best not to ask how Grunch acquired all these gifts because you know it's not because he's been nice.

name: Fledgling Warden's Companion
description: This young fledgeling is ready and eager to begin training.

name: Gizmo the Pure
description: In life, Gizmo never hurt a soul. Having been brutally murdered, he now considers violence.

name: Pascal the Wonder Pup
description: PH - Tech was made to allow customizations.

name: Flotsam Harvester
description: These tiny harvesters are often deployed along the coastline during low tide to collect cargo and timbers that have washed ashore from shipwrecks.

name: Tobias
description: With a nose for secrets, Tobias is ready to be by the side of super sleuths.

name: Portentous Present
description: Previous owners of the crate have reported the disappearance of other pets from their collection.

name: Cliffreach Cub
description: These small cubs are as fiesty as they are cuddly.

name: Lil' Maggz
description: As heir to the Lord of Outland, Maggz has always shared his family's love of violence and power. He just happens to be even more in love with pet treats.

name: Tiny Snow Buddy
description: So much holiday spirit inside an itty-bitty amount of snow, it only makes sense to share it with the world!

name: Swamp Biter
description: Lurking beneath dark waters with needle sharp teeth. You can bite and drink their blood too, though. It's allowed.

name: Nether Siphoner
description: A gnashing maw of teeth and tongues. This beast bears an uncanny resemblance to Azerothian leeches.

name: Azure Sporebat
description: Distinct from the sporebats that reside on Draenor and Outland. It's just a coincidence.

name: Reverie
description: The duck of your dreams... or perhaps someone else's dreams.

name: Blueloo
description: If you ever have an outdoor feast in the Emerald Dream, look out for wild blueloos. A blueloo won't steal your picinic basket, but it will politely ask for some snacks.

name: Chillbot 9000
description:
RELAXATION MODE: ENGAGED.
RELAXATION LEVEL: MAXIMUM.
INTERNAL TEMPERATURE: LOW.

name: Sparklesnap
description: Reaching for what you thought was a pile of plunder turned out to be Sparklesnap's treasure-laden shell. After mistakenly petting his back, he now eagerly follows you.

name: N'Ruby
description: A lifetime of servitude to Anub'arak, then the Lich King, and now... you!

name: Slim
description: One kobyss's meal is another adventurer's bestie.

name: Sir Shady Mrrgglton Junior
description: The shadowy creature has been following Sir Finley Mrrgglton around ever since he happened upon it during one of his expeditions. Having grown quite fond of the tenebrous friend, Sir Finley won't part with it easily.

name: Umbral Amalgam
description: These swarms of void energy cannot persist in Beledar's light.

name: Dragonhawk Mosswing
description: These dragonhawks developed in the wilds of Zul'aman, where their green feathers and molt help them hide from hunters and predators.

name: Pokee
description: The needle in Pokee's eye isn't exactly comfortable fashion, but he's stuck with it.

name: Alchemical Runoff
description: Lab leaks are sometimes dangerous. Sometimes, they're cute. Sometimes, both!

name: Parley
description: Parley is a rather serious and grumpy bird. If you value your eyeballs, it's best not to ask if Parley wants a cracker.

name: Clay Stonecharger
description: The swooping horns of protorams bear the scars of every charge.

name: Sandstone Ramolith
description: They loves sand. It's coarse, and it gets everywhere.

name: Tidbit
description: Most felstalkers are fiercesome and ravenous. This one, however, seems to be feeling a bit lonely.

name: Morsel
description: Known to take a bite out of his owner. Pet cautiously.

name: Newsy
description: Newsy delivers mail all around the Dragon Isles. She is so quick and reliable that the small holes on the letters she delivers are negligible.

name: Drowsey
description: Is it a snail? Is it a dream? Is it the dream of a sleeping snail?

name: Storm-Infused Snapdragon
description: Snapdragon pups that were abandoned on the shores have become infused with the energies of the Seafury Tempest, as the other Siren Isle creatures have.

name: Scavenging Snapdragon
description: It is said that from the moment they hatch snapdragons are independent from their parents, though the more recent venture to Nazjatar has seemingly debunked this theory.

name: Zo'ya
description: Zo'ya is cunning and beautiful, both highly desirable traits among purrkins. Despite being the culprit behind many mishaps, her warm glow ensures she is forgiven for any transgression.

name: Slippery Saul
description: Slippery Saul loves to slide around the ground or the sea looking for fish.

name: Snorr
description: Wyvern whelps are sleepy by nature. The dreams of wyvern whelps are doubly so.

name: Unfazed Diver
description: While purrkin have a knack for getting lost, none have ever been so talented as this one. Purrfectly unbothered however, this curious creature can thrive in any situation.

name: Fishmonger May
description: You can never have too many fish according to May.

name: Crackleroar
description: This small cub has been influenced by constant storms on Siren Isle. Just petting it's soft fur sends static shocks across your hand.

name: Skitterbite
description: This krolusk seems to display an unusual level of intellegence in it's shiny red, reflective eyes.

name: Parrlok
description: Ancient Gorian blood runs through Parrlok's veins. As far as anyone knows, his desire for enjoying pastries and chatting with his friends keeps his imperial ambitions in check.

name: Gummi
description: Gummi baubleworms have an abundance of natural predators, as they are known for their rubbery texture and sweet flavors.

name: Fishstick Keith
description: Frozen fish are Keiths favorite treat. If you've got frozen fish, you've got a new best friend.

name: Festive Eve
description: Winter festivities seem to follow Eve wherever she goes.

name: Rusziona
description: Rusziona's newfound courage means she can accompany you on adventures! Nothing in all of Azeroth can stop her! Not even a duck!

name: Mitzy
description: When she grows up, Mitzy wants to guide Greatfather Winter's sleigh just like Metzen, her famous dad. Until then, she's more than happy to come with you on your adventures.

name: Lil' Flameo
description: Lil' Flameo is ready to drop foolish pets if they get in the way.

name: Niblet
description: Glows green, occassionally.

name: Flooftalon
description: The first thing you might notice about this creature is its huge expressive eyes. This is a mistake. Instead focus on its razor-sharp claws.

name: Fol'ya Pup
description: Keep it out of your backpack or it will eat all your food and then take a nap.

name: Sapnibbler
description: Sapnibblers are always up for a game of hide and squeak.

name: Bundled-Up Bob
description: Once native to the northern regions of the Eastern Kingdoms, this species of seal is now only common in Northrend after being hunted for food and leather during the Second War.

name: Gale
description: A Stormrider's stormrook can not only navigate extreme winds with grace but can also conjure fierce tempests to defend themselves.

name: Flash
description: Emberrooks are the rarest and most aggressive of the rook elementals.

name: Thundo
description: A full-sized stormrook's thunder can be heard for miles. The chirps of this small spark sound like a faulty electrical device.

name: Ruby-Eyed Stagshell
description: Stagshells crave violence. Or at least simulated representations of violence.

name: Rak-Ush Battleshell
description: Raised as living tanks for Anub'azal's army, Rak-Ush's battleshells are surprisingly affectionate. Who's a good beetle?

name: Leyhart
description: This little one likes cheese, but most fawn do.

name: Slumbertooth
description: As younglings, these critters need a lot of naps. Fortunately, adventurers' backpacks make good napping spots.

name: Pewling
description: If you think the skunks of the Emerald Dream smell bad, pray that you never smell the skunks of the Emerald Nightmare.

name: Hoplet
description: Because it's her favorite holiday, Hoplet wears her Lunar Festival outfit year-ound.

name: Thrillbot 9000
description:
PRIMARY DIRECTIVE: ENGAGE IN HEROICS.
PREFERRED HEROICS: THRILLING.
SECONDARY DIRECTIVE: BECOME HERO.
PREFERRED HERO: BIG.

name: Sergeant Quackers
description: When enemy combatants fly overhead, there's only one thing to do. Duck.

name: Aura
description: At a young age Aura donned her magic hat, took her crystal staff, and set off for adventure into the unknown.

name: Akil Fledgling
description: The molted feathers of these young eagles are used to build comfortable bedding for the Amani.

name: Baa'lial
description: Also known as the Lord of Lies, Baa'lial is a master of deceit.

name: Mote of Nasz'uro
description: The light of the new legacy illuminates the path you forge.

name: Graceful Cosmic Ray Pup
description: Efforts to rewire the more desctructive tendencies of the species left this specimen more docile than most, but it was still not a successful endeavor.

name: Starlight
description: Seeks out the light of the stars. Even in the daytime.

name: Rootling Nester
description: Young grovecrawlers are known to curl up around the ankles of its protectors for rest.

name: Pangolil
description: He's scheming. Smirking. Don't trust him.

name: Gloom Toad
description: Have a hoppy day!

name: Silkcrawler
description: Totally gonna transform into a beautiful winged creature, yup. It just might take a few dozen years.

name: Lovely Duckling
description: Of all the shades and colors of ducklings that come forth in the spring, the most prized are the pink ones. There are many theories about why, but it's likely just because pink is awesome.

name: Duskthief
description: Drawn to shiny objects. And darkness. Especially darkness.

name: Sao'rhon
description: A very friendly cosmic being. Direct eye contact will obliterate your soul.

name: Inquisitive Cosmic Ray Pup
description: This cosmic ray pup is curious about a great many things. Don't let it get into trouble (again)!

name: Beetriz
description: Yellow maidenbugs are often mistaken for other yellow insects. This happens even more often to Beetriz, and she doesn't understand why.

name: Reese
description: Even Nirobin, a self-proclaimed genius of the highest caliber, could not deny the cuteness of his arcane creation.

name: Hap'he
description: It is bewildering how the most arrogant and stuck up of the Azerothian Archivists can't help but create the most adorable arcane familiars. Perhaps Nirobin does have a soft side...

name: Pale Slumbertooth
description: These creatures live in bushes and near trees, but they sleep so soundly they're practically invisible. If you want to interrupt their dreaming, you'd best bring friends.

name: Ebon Ploughworm
description: Hard to spot in the dark, these worms have taught many adventureres a lesson, when sticking their fingers where they don't belong.

name: Common Ploughworm
description: Used both in battle and as pack animals when they're larger, at this size they're only a danger to your ankles.

name: Lil' Bonechewer
description: Lil' Bonechewer loves you, even if you were a worm. Especially if you were a worm.

name: Violet Sporbit
description: Dangerous, toxic spores? What if it was purple?!

name: Specter
description: Found by Taunka as a newborn pup Specter is fiercely loyal. Yet he is beginning to live up to his name as he stalks into the world.

name: Karazhan Syphoner
description: Rarely captured alive, syphoners are some of the most dangerous of the mana wyrms. This one happened to have been distracted while binging on a particularly juicy spell book in the Karazhan library.

name: Mud Potadpole
description: They do NOT taste like potatoes. Promise.

name: Violet Chick
description: These prissy, flightless birds are known to relentlessly groom themselves. Much like their riders.

name: Teele
description: Teele's grandparents told him they were the mice that discovered Azeroth. They were also champion fibbers.

name: Hemospore
description: Fungal spores awash in the blood of fallen monstrosities.

name: Emerald Sporbit
description: This collection of spores exploded one too many times on its previous owner. Maybe you'll have better luck with it.

name: Briarhorn Hatchling
description: Loves: Broccoli, playing, and smashing things. Hates: Meat, sleeping, and mean titan keepers who won't let you smash things.

name: Gill'dan
description: Gill'dan earned his great power by drinking the blood of a demon, which would also have turned his scales green had they not already been that color.

name: Wind-Up Wuffi
description: With a face this lovable Wuffi is sure you'll wind-up being the best of friends.

name: Wind-Up Woofer
description: A wag of their tail always brings a smile to your face, like clockwork.

name: Sa'bak's Blessed
description: According to Tol'vir beliefs, a crocolisk nest that hatches during the Festival of the Sun is said to be blessed by the river guardian, Sa'bak.

name: Ebon Snapling
description: Oh snap!! Lizard!

name: Snaggletoof
description: Such toof. Such snaggle.

name: Glamrok
description: Glamrok followed you back to the ship one day after a particularly good plunder, sensing your keen knack for treasure-finding.

name: Bubbles
description: Where do all of the bubbles come from? What are they made of? Perhaps some mysteries are best left unexplored.

name: Jeepers
description: This eye has witnessed untold horrors, and these fangs may be responsible for a few of their own.

name: Doomrubble
description: He seems to be very angry, but it's possible he's just hungry.

name: Slyvy
description: These astral phenomena are rarely sighted due to the speed of the slyvern. It is a good omen to have one following you around.

name: Nelle
description: Though fully-grown maidenbugs are able to fly, Nelle is just a bit too young for that. She's happy to skitter alongside you all the same.

name: Spicy Mean-Ball
description: Now this is one, spicy, mean, ball.

name: Mr. Long-Legs
description: A favorite pet of some poor soul from before the fall of K'aresh, found trapped in stasis.

name: Blistercreepling
description: You'd think with all those spikes, it might pop its own pustule sac. But no! Its pustule sac is actually really sturdy! Pustule sac!

name: Subterranean Dartswog
description: Found predominately underground, some of them prefer the surface. But that's none of my business.

name: Troglofrog
description: The sound of the troglofrog echoing throughout deep caverns sounds almost like... ragtime music?

name: Dalaran Sewer Turtle
description: More than a typical turtle, he's a hero in a half shell!

name: Mind Slurp
description: One shudders to imagine whether the name was based off of what it is... or what it does.

name: Lil' Chompers
description: If you have a fish odds are Lil' Chompers will be nearby.

name: Killbot 9000
description: DEFECTIVE; REFUSES TO KILL. MARK FOR IMMEDIATE DESTRUCTION OR SALE TO LESS INTELLIGENT ENTITY.

name: Obsidian Warwhelp
description: A war-obsessed world turned her into a weapon... but they couldn't break her spirit.

name: Heka'Tarnos, Bringer of Discord
description: This exceptionally loud lapbug's calls were enough to throw the already destabilized elements in the local area into complete disarray. Now it's your turn to get bugged.

name: Copper Lapbug
description: Lapbugs were widely prized as domesticated pets before the fall of K'aresh. Copper lapbugs were especially sought-after.

name: Cerulean Lapbug
description: Widely prized as pets, cerulean lapbugs were thought to bring good fortune.

name: Flicker
description: A rare black-furred Eversong lynx kitten, its fur faintly thrumming with arcane energy, bred by Silvermoon's Magisters as both companion and conduit of magical study.

name: Sporbie
description: "In this house we don't lay spores in people's ears when they sleep, no matter how funny their face is when they wake up."

name: Ziorg'pharon
description: Ziorg'pharon, Emissary of the Cosmic Unknown, Ender of All That Is, Was, and Will Ever Be, or Zigy, as his friends call him, is physically incapable of harming a fly.

name: Kreepah'zoyd
description: It doesn't bite. It rips and tears.

name: Spormilian
description: Waddles around in a constant cloud of spores. Harmless? Hard to say--we're still waiting on the research team... or what's left of them.

name: Lost Star
description: Nothing is known for certain, though some believe it calls the night sky its home.

name: Ominous Domanus
description: Truly evil, undeniably powerful... but above all, spectacularly lazy.

name: Hexed Bunny
description: In the wrong place at the wrong time.

name: Treja'saka
description: A curious species found only within treasure chests. Harmless enough, unless you happen to be wearing jewelry.

name: Nibblesworth
description: Very unhappy. Always goes for the jugular. Kind of cute.

name: Gortham
description: A living anomaly and Kasreth's most treasured experiment, this pink-furred creature scampers joyfully through conduits and pipes.

name: Grumpy Mandrake
description: Warning: It may root against you.

name: Nova
description: He is a lover, not a battler.

name: Emberwing Hatchling
description: Born near the funeral pyre in Solemn Valley, this young eagle's burgundy feathers still carry the scent of smoke and ash. A quiet reminder that even in loss, something new can take wing.

name: Roofus
description: Roofus is ready to lend a paw for any construction project. Treats aren't required, but are appreciated.

name: Bubbly Snapling
description: What a happy snapling!

name: Star the Lucky Dragon
description: Star just hatched and is ready for adventure. Sometimes napping is the greatest adventure of all.

name: Gummi the Glow Wyrm
description: Gummi the Glow Wyrm has an abundance of natural predators, as it is known for their rubbery texture and sweet flavors.

name: Distorted Memory
description: A roiling memory drawn to you from the Rift of Aln.

name: Luma
description: Luma knows all kinds of tricks such as "sit," "stay," and "steal."

name: Linda the Lucky
description: This potadpole is grateful for your assistance after having been exposed to the Lightboom.

name: Lil' Staropod
description: Stars walk among us in the shape of a baby brutosaur.

name: Blitzcreek
description: Evolving in the Voidstorm has really made its smaller inhabitants significantly more aggressive.

name: Fidoficus
description: While it didn't make a good test subject, perhaps it will make a good companion.

name: Voldy
description: Sometimes the void's call is faint, so smaller, younger voidwalkers heed its call.

name: Kai
description: Formed by the latent energies from the Singularity Anchor this Behemoth will be loyal till the end.

name: Sootpaw
description: This magical scout can often be found rummaging for arcane treats  in the refuse of long-past adventurers.

name: Princess Bloodshed
description: Taking after her mother, Dame Bloodshed, the Princess is armed with the sharpest of claws and the furriest of ears.

name: Dali
description: Dali, bored of his days basking in the comfort of the Solaarian Sunbath, seeks a world of new inspiration. You are that inspiration, and he will bring color to your world.

name: Willie
description: This bold elfhound was born to chase mana wyrms, and mana wyrm-shaped objects... Like unattended sausages.

name: Assistant Botanist Leafy
description: Assistant Botanist Leafy is an expert at identifying edible plants... which is all of them.

name: Perturbed Sporebat
description: After being rudely stuffed into a gourd in a vain effort to treat a Lightbloom infestation, this sporebat's just grateful to be out.

name: Medusa
description: She hates head pats, hence the spiky armor.

name: Razeshi C.
description: Razeshi C. is known for her understanding tempermant, measured responses and a love for gossip. The C. stands for "Class act."
